tasks.label: kill-port-5149
tasks.command: try { $p = (netstat -ano | Select-String ':5149 .*LISTENING' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } catch {}; exit 0

tasks.label: kill-port-5152
tasks.command: try { $p = (netstat -ano | Select-String ':5152 .*LISTENING' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } catch {}; exit 0

tasks.label: wait-port-5152
tasks.command: $max=60; for($i=0;$i -lt $max;$i++){ if((Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5152 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue).TcpTestSucceeded){ exit 0 }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; Write-Error 'Port 5152 did not open in time.'; exit 1

tasks.label: watch-and-open-crm-chrome
tasks.command: Start-Process powershell -WindowStyle Hidden -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-Command',"$max=120; for($i=0;$i -lt $max;$i++){ if((Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5152 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue).TcpTestSucceeded){ Start-Process 'chrome.exe' 'http://localhost:5152/'; exit 0 }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }"; exit 0
